$description: Narrative Stack canonical design tokens. v1.1. May 2026.

darkBlue.$description: Primary brand color. Dominant background. The depth. Represents narrative discernment.

azure.$description: System voice accent. Scarce. Used for methodology markers, framework labels, system inflections. NEVER appears on the same surface as Coral.

coral.$description: Human voice accent. Used for pull quotes, reflection moments, Field Guide warmth, retail products. NEVER appears on the same surface as Azure.

paper.$description: Warm white background. Used for breathing-room surfaces, human voice slides, the Field Guide interior. NEVER substitute pure white #FFFFFF.

ink.$description: Pure text on light surfaces. Maximum contrast.

graphite.$description: Secondary text. Body copy that recedes from headlines.

mute.$description: Tertiary text. Metadata. Timestamps. Section labels in monospace.

midBlue.$description: Bridge tone for horizon treatments. Optional. Use only in specific Fluid register imagery.

mist.$description: Pale azure tint. Optional. For light surfaces requiring a subtle cool wash.

cream.$description: Warm alternative background for premium print applications.

serif.$value: GT Sectra Display, Tiempos Headline, Source Serif 4, Georgia, serif
serif.$description: Editorial italic. All display, headlines, body, pull quotes. The brand's voice.

sans.$value: GT America, Söhne, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
sans.$description: The STACK wordmark. System labels. Navigation. Headlines on system-voice surfaces.

mono.$value: GT America Mono, JetBrains Mono, monospace
mono.$description: Section labels. Metadata. Timestamps. Framework markers (EVIDENCE 01, FRAMEWORK TRUST DYNAMICS).

black.$description: Used for the STACK wordmark only.

comfortable.$description: Body copy. The default for long-form reading.

spacing.$description: All spacing is a multiple of 8px. The 8/16/24/40/64 sequence covers most cases.

hairline.$description: System labels, fine borders, wordmark slices.

anchor.$description: Left bars on callout boxes in documents.

maxContentWidth.$description: Maximum content width for long-form reading.

rules.$description: Brand rules that are not directly visual tokens but must be respected by any tool consuming this file.
rules.accentExclusion: Azure and Coral never appear on the same surface. Choose one per surface based on the voice (system or human).
rules.proportionRule: Approximately 70% dominant surface color (Dark Blue or Paper), 20% supporting type colors, 10% active accent.
rules.deckRhythm: In multi-slide formats, alternate dark-dominant and light-dominant surfaces at roughly 3:1 to 4:1 ratio.
rules.noPureWhite: Use Paper (#FAFAF7) instead of pure white (#FFFFFF). The warmth is intentional.
rules.noGradients: Gradients are forbidden across the entire system. Color transitions happen by adjacency, not by blending.
rules.noStockBusiness: Generic stock photography of businesspeople, handshakes, light bulbs, or office settings is forbidden.
